uplink.description: Typical data report: 3.6 V, 25.38 C, 68 %RH, PM2.5 300
uplink._note: Inputs synthesized in-bounds (RH 0-100); reference TTN decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js) yields Volt 3.6, Temp 25.38, Humi 68, PM25 300. Normalized here: battery (V), air.temperature/air.relativeHumidity, pm2_5 extra.

uplink.description: Negative temperature with low-battery flag: 3.1 V (low), -1.00 C, 47.5 %RH, PM2.5 200
uplink._note: Inputs synthesized in-bounds; byte3 high bit set -> low battery (0x1F=3.1 V); temp two's-complement (0xFF9C -> -100 -> -1.00 C); reference decoder yields Volt '3.1(low battery)', Temp -1, Humi 47.5, PM25 200.

uplink.description: Zero humidity, warm: 3.0 V, 5.00 C, 0 %RH, PM2.5 0
uplink._note: Inputs synthesized in-bounds; reference decoder yields Volt 3, Temp 5, Humi 0, PM25 0.
Inputs synthesized in-bounds (RH at upper bound 100; raw 0x2710=10000 -> 100.00 %); reference decoder yields Volt 3.3, Temp 0, Humi 100, PM25 1000.
Upstream returns device/SW/HW/datecode info on reportType 0x00; this is not a measurement, so the normalized codec reports an error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (no measurement)
